news.headline: ComEd receives $50M federal grant for Rockford grid modernization to deliver clean energy in Illinois communities.
news.summary: In Rockford, Illinois, ComEd has been awarded $50 million in federal funding by the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE) following a competitive selection process. Governor Pritzker, alongside the Mayor of Rockford and Region 1 Planning Council (R1), announced this partnership aimed at improving the power grid's capacity to supply affordable and clean energy to communities in Illinois. With these funds, ComEd and local collaborators will implement advanced clean energy projects, increase carbon-free energy sources, and enhance the overall sustainability of the region.

news.headline: Epic Hire wins 2024 NC TECH Awards Top Tech Start Ups to Watch, recognition for innovation in tech sector.
news.summary: Epic Hire, based in Raleigh, North Carolina, has won the prestigious NC TECH Awards Top Tech Start Ups to Watch award. This award is part of the NC TECH Awards program presented by NC TECH (North Carolina Technology Association), which honors innovation, growth, and leadership in the tech industry. Epic Hire is a talent marketplace connecting employers and university students, revolutionizing how candidates showcase their skills. The NC TECH Awards is the only statewide technology awards in North Carolina.

news.headline: New ACRM designation by The Institutes helps individuals and organizations build cyber resilience; focuses on cyber risk management.
news.summary: Located in Malvern, Pennsylvania, the Associate in Cyber Risk Management™ (ACRM™) stands out as a unique program focused solely on cyber risk management. This specialized offering distinguishes itself by addressing the critical need for professionals in this field.

news.headline: Dynatrace labeled a Leader in 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring, after evaluated among 12 vendors.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Dynatrace (NYSE: DT) has achieved the status of Leader in the inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring. Out of the 12 vendors assessed, Dynatrace was acknowledged for its strong Completeness of Vision and Ability to Execute. The 2024 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Digital Experience Monitoring can be accessed for free on the Dynatrace website. The company expressed gratitude for its recognition as a Leader in this essential industry evaluation.

news.headline: Viking Therapeutics' stock surges after unveiling weight-loss quad, outpacing Eli Lilly's obesity triplet.
news.summary: Shares of Viking Therapeutics surged on Thursday following the announcement of its weight-loss quad, delivering a setback to Eli Lilly's experimental triple combination for obesity treatment. This news caused Viking Therapeutics stock to skyrocket, signaling a significant market reaction. The competition between the two companies in the obesity treatment sector has attracted investor attention, with Viking Therapeutics gaining momentum. The details shared by Viking Therapeutics have created buzz in the investment community, driving up the stock price. This development highlights the importance of innovation and competitive strategies in the pharmaceutical industry, with Viking Therapeutics making notable progress. Eli Lilly's position in the market faces a challenge from this latest advancement, showcasing the dynamic nature of the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Tesla stock surges 18% as investors view it as an early Christmas gift, bullish sentiments prevail.
news.summary: Investors are eyeing an aggressive early entry into Tesla stock following a significant surge of 18%. This unexpected boost, likened to an 'early Christmas present,' has attracted bullish sentiment among market participants.

news.headline: AI data centers boosting tech infrastructure stocks w/ strong Q3 results. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Tech infrastructure companies supporting AI data centers have reported impressive financial performance in the third quarter. These firms are benefiting greatly from the increasing demand for AI technology, with significant growth in revenue and profits. The success of AI data centers is driving the business of these tech infrastructure stocks, as they continue to attract investors and outperform market expectations.

news.headline: Nasdaq leads bounce as Tesla soars on earnings; Dow Jones lags. Weekly jobless claims fall. - Investor's Business Daily
news.summary: Today, the stock market had a predominantly positive start on Thursday, with the Nasdaq leading the gains as Tesla's stock surged following strong earnings results. The market also saw a decrease in weekly jobless claims. A mix of earnings reports contributed to the overall positive sentiment in early trading. The Dow Jones lagged behind, while other tech players experienced notable breakouts. This highlights a day marked by a flurry of activity in the stock market.

news.headline: GOAT Meme Coin GOAT hits Top 100 on Binance Futures, fast-growing after Solana's BOME, an AI-based token.
news.summary: The Goatse Maximus (GOAT) token, created by artificial intelligence, has emerged as the quickest-growing meme coin, surpassing the popularity of Book of Meme (BOME).

news.headline: AI-generated memecoins are gaining a cult following, with the Department of Divine Shitposting contributing to the hype. Experts warn of a bubble in AI.
news.summary: A new concept is being spread by the Department of Divine Shitposting aiming to generate interest in AI-created religions. Experts in academia are suggesting that AI technology might be experiencing a bubble with uncertain consequences. This development indicates a growing trend towards exploring the intersection of AI and religion, with a widening discussion around the potential risks and rewards of these advancements.

news.headline: MetalCore shifts to Solana utilizing GameShift platform by Solana Labs, inclusive of storefront and payment systems.
news.summary: MetalCore plans to leverage Solana Labs' GameShift platform, which provides a comprehensive solution for in-game transactions. This platform includes a storefront and payment systems to facilitate in-game purchases seamlessly.

news.headline: Former FTX exec praised for cooperation by US govt before sentencing. Singh's help in case against Bankman-Fried emphasized.
news.summary: During sentencing, prosecutors urged Judge Lewis Kaplan to take into account the significant aid provided by Nishad Singh to the government in its case against Sam Bankman-Fried.

news.headline: Mortgage rates have increased for the fourth consecutive week. Discover where renting may be more affordable.
Southwest Airlines reports $0.15 EPS surpassing estimates, revenue hits $6.87 billion, shares drop by 3% due to Boeing delivery concerns despite an Elliott deal.
news.summary: Southwest Airlines Co. saw its shares drop by 3% during Thursday trading in New York, despite the airline surpassing expectations in its third-quarter earnings and reaching a key settlement with Elliott Investment Management. The airline reported an adjusted EPS of $0.15, beating predictions of a breakeven quarter, while revenue stood at $6.87 billion, above the expected $6.735 billion. Southwest credited robust travel demand for the earnings beat. However, concerns over potential Boeing delivery delays dampened investor sentiment. The agreement with Elliott includes a board restructuring, with six new directors joining, five of whom are Elliott's nominees, though Elliott won't achieve majority control. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: NTT DATA Japan partners with Oracle Alloy to enhance sovereign cloud solutions, offering 150+ Oracle Cloud services.
news.summary: Shares of Oracle Corporation (NYSE:ORCL) saw an increase in trading on Thursday as NTT DATA Japan announced their selection of Oracle Alloy to aid Japanese organizations in the public and private sectors. This collaboration aims to speed up cloud adoption, ensuring data sovereignty and compliance. Through Oracle Alloy in their data centers, NTT DATA Japan will grant customers access to more than 150 Oracle Cloud Infrastructure services, featuring advanced AI functions. Additionally, Oracle Alloy facilitates Oracle partners in becoming cloud service providers. NTT DATA Japan plans to enhance its sovereign cloud, OpenCanvas, through Alloy in two data centers.

news.headline: Onion recall due to E.Coli linked to McDonald’s Quarter Pounders - 1 death & numerous illnesses reported.
news.summary: Authorities reported that the onions placed on the well-liked burger are believed to be the main cause of an E. coli outbreak that has resulted in the death of one individual and the illness of a significant number of others.

news.headline: Vallourec reports monthly information on voting rights and shares with share capital of €4,761,042.58. Company based in France.
news.summary: VALLOUREC is a French public limited liability company with a Board of Directors and a share capital of €4,761,042.58. The company's registered office is located at 12, rue de la Verrerie in Meudon, France. VALLOUREC is registered on the Nanterre Trade and Companies Register under the number 552 142 200.

news.headline: XPO recognized as one of America's Most Reliable Companies for 2025 by Newsweek, a top transportation provider in North America.
news.summary: In Greenwich, Connecticut, on October 24, 2024, XPO, a prominent freight transportation provider in North America listed on NYSE as XPO, was acknowledged as one of "America's Most Reliable Companies" for 2025 as per Newsweek magazine. This inaugural list celebrates U.S.-based firms known for their persistent service and reliability. Newsweek ranked XPO among the top transportation companies on the list, highlighting its exceptional performance.

news.headline: Mortgage rates rise to 6.54% for the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage, according to Freddie Mac.
news.summary: Freddie Mac, based in McLean, Virginia, disclosed in a report on October 24, 2024, that the 30-year fixed-rate mortgage (FRM) had an average of 6.54 percent, according to its Primary Mortgage Market Survey® (PMMS®).

news.headline: Northeast Bank to release Q1 earnings on Oct 29, 2024, followed by conference call on Oct 30, 2024 at 10:00 am ET.
news.summary: In Portland, Maine, Northeast Bank, a full-service bank based in Maine and listed on NASDAQ as NBN, is set to reveal its fiscal 2025 first quarter earnings on October 29, 2024. A conference call with a synchronized webcast will be held the next day, October 30, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. ET. President and CEO Rick Wayne, CFO Richard Cohen, and COO Pat Dignan will be leading the conference call.

news.headline: Westamerica Bancorporation (NASDAQ: WABC) announces $0.44 quarterly cash dividend for shareholders; payable Nov 15, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in San Rafael, California, Westamerica Bancorporation (NASDAQ: WABC) announced that their Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.44 per share on outstanding common stock. This dividend will be payable on November 15, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 4, 2024.

news.headline: Witan's alliance raises dividend post merger, offering significant growth for stakeholders.
AI-based Drug Repurposing Market expected to grow from 2024-2029, offering faster drug development process with reduced costs.
news.summary: A report titled "AI-based Drug Repurposing Market, Growth Opportunities, Global, 2024-2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The study delves into the rise of AI-based drug repurposing, investigating the factors that contribute to or impede its adoption. Conventional drug discovery constraints have sparked a surge in interest in AI-based drug repurposing due to its benefits in terms of time, efficiency, and expenses. This innovative approach has gained traction in the industry, offering significant advantages.

news.headline: Former president hints at eliminating income taxes, favoring tariffs for government funding.
news.summary: The ex-president has frequently lauded a time in U.S. history when there was zero income tax and tariffs were the main source of government revenue.

news.headline: Casual chat between Coinbase's Brian Armstrong and GOAT Bot causes 'Russell' meme coin to surge in price.
news.summary: An interaction on Twitter between Brian Armstrong of Coinbase and an online bot has led to a significant increase in the value of a meme coin.

news.headline: Acclaim Lighting appoints Ethan Aberg as Central Regional Sales Manager, overseeing sales strategy in Central US.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Acclaim Lighting has announced Ethan Aberg as the new Central Regional Sales Manager. Aberg, a Lighting Certified LC Professional by the National Council on Qualifications for Lighting Professions and a member of the Illuminating Engineering Society, will oversee sales strategy in the Central U.S. In this role, he will be responsible for planning, managing, and implementing sales initiatives. Aberg's appointment underlines Acclaim Lighting's commitment to driving growth in the region.

news.headline: IMF meeting to discuss Ukraine support and EIB's energy transition goals. #news #Ukraine #IMF #EIB
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that approximately 14,500 new cases of a certain disease have been reported in the country this past week, bringing the total number of cases to over 250,000. Health officials have expressed concerns over the spike in numbers and have urged the public to continue practicing safety measures such as wearing masks and social distancing. The government is also considering implementing stricter measures to curb the spread of the disease. Additionally, it has been reported that the vaccination rate has reached 40% of the population, with plans to ramp up vaccination efforts in the coming weeks.

news.headline: Einhorn praises Peloton, sees many positives.
FHLBNY released unaudited financial highlights for Q3 2024 on Oct 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, the Federal Home Loan Bank of New York ("FHLBNY") published its unaudited financial results for the quarter concluding on September 30, 2024.

news.headline: Nexity reports strong business performance with revenue growth for the first nine months of 2024.
news.summary: Yesterday, it was reported that the global unemployment rate has reached 6% due to the ongoing economic downturn. This has led to over 190 million people being out of work, with the youth unemployment rate hitting a record high of 14%. The situation is particularly dire in developing countries, where job losses have been most severe. The International Labor Organization has called for urgent action to address this crisis and prevent further damage to the global economy.

news.headline: ORYZON reported financial results for nine months ending Sept 30, 2024 and corporate updates. 100 characters.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, Oryzon Genomics, S.A., a biopharmaceutical company based in Madrid and Cambridge, MA, disclosed its financial performance for the nine months until September 30, 2024. The company, traded under the ISIN Code ES0167733015 and ticker symbol ORY, is focused on utilizing epigenetics to create treatments for diseases lacking adequate medical solutions. The update covered recent corporate activities and progress made during this period.

news.headline: Coinbase stock hits $203 mark, a key support/resistance level. Market dynamics shift as demand absorbs supply.
news.summary: Experienced traders are adept at recognizing crucial price points referred to as support and resistance levels. It is often observed in the market that support levels can switch to resistance, and vice versa. For instance, the $203 mark has alternated between serving as support and resistance for Coinbase Global Inc. (NASDAQ: COIN) since May, as depicted in the chart. This is why our team of trading professionals has spotlighted it as the Stock of the Day.In a scenario where a market is declining, the imbalance between buy and sell orders leads to downward price pressure as sellers drive the price lower to attract buyers. Conversely, when a stock hits a support level, the dynamic shifts, with demand outstripping supply. This prompts traders to... (remainder of the story available on Benzinga.com).

news.headline: GeForce NOW adds Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 and Romancing SaGa 2 to its cloud gaming lineup, offering new features and rewards like the Stag-Heart Skull Sallet Hat. Discover more.
news.summary: Two new games, Call of Duty: Black Ops 6 and Romancing SaGa 2, have been introduced to GeForce NOW, expanding its cloud gaming collection. Gamers are now able to explore fresh features and receive rewards such as the exclusive Stag-Heart Skull Sallet Hat. This move bolsters the platform with more gaming options and incentives for players.

news.headline: Bitcoin miner wins $222,000 jackpot despite challenging conditions, highlighting perseverance of solo miners.
news.summary: Mining Bitcoin has become increasingly challenging, with a current hash rate of over 120 EH/s and an all-time high difficulty level. Despite this, some individual miners continue to push through and have managed to claim rewards as high as 6.25 BTC.

news.headline: AuditBoard and Protiviti collaborate on advanced audit services at Audit & Beyond event in Las Vegas. Joint capabilities focus on analytics, collaboration, transformation, and digitization.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, AuditBoard and Protiviti revealed new collaborative services at the Audit & Beyond event. AuditBoard, a top cloud-based management platform, partnered with Protiviti, a renowned global consulting firm specializing in internal audit. Their joint capabilities focus on advanced analytics, collaboration, transformation, and digitization to assist audit, risk, and infosec leaders. The partnership offers a comprehensive solution for teams looking to enhance their preparation for managing these areas effectively. This announcement was made during a key event attended by industry professionals.

news.headline: Elavon launches unified cloud-based Payment Gateway for global merchants, simplifying in-store and online payments.
news.summary: Elavon, a subsidiary of U.S. Bank and a leading global payment processor, has introduced the Elavon Payment Gateway, a cloud-based solution to improve payment experiences for merchants and consumers. This gateway consolidates various payment options into a single omni-commerce platform, utilizing advanced cloud technology to cater to customers worldwide. The Elavon Payment Gateway aims to streamline and elevate payment processes, offering a user-friendly experience for a broad customer base.

news.headline: NetHope launches Partner Collective for Global Humanitarian ISAC at 2024 Summit, uniting orgs for cybersecurity mission.
news.summary: NetHope has revealed the introduction of the Partner Collective for the Global Humanitarian Information Sharing and Analysis Center (Global Humanitarian ISAC) during the 2024 NetHope Global Summit held in Washington. This collaboration brings together a formidable coalition of organizations committed to offering financial support, knowledge, resources, and technology to bolster the Global Humanitarian Information Sharing and Analysis Center’s efforts in strengthening cybersecurity for worldwide humanitarian aid.

news.headline: Hampton by Hilton collaborated with Paris Hilton to introduce the Sparkling Strawberry Hampton Waffle, available in 2,400 hotels from October 24. Guests can also purchase the waffle mix online for at-home dining.
news.summary: In a partnership between Hampton by Hilton and Paris Hilton's 11:11 Media, a new addition to the waffle lineup has been announced. The Sparkling Strawberry Hampton Waffle by Paris Hilton will bring a pop of pink and a touch of sparkle to the menu. Available for guests staying at over 2,400 hotels across the United States and Canada starting from October 24, this new waffle offers a unique twist to the legendary breakfast item. For the first time ever, customers will also have the option to buy the waffle mix, complete with edible glitter, online. This allows fans to recreate the Hampton breakfast experience in the comfort of their own homes.

news.headline: Mave secures $2M in pre-seed funding, debuts beta program for AI assistant aiding real estate agents.
news.summary: A technology startup in Toronto, Mave, has successfully secured $2 million in pre-seed funding. The company has also announced the launch of a beta program for its AI assistant specially designed for real estate agents and brokers. This funding milestone indicates a strong investor interest in Mave's innovative AI solutions for the real estate industry. The beta program is set to provide agents and brokers with early access to Mave's AI assistant, allowing them to experience its capabilities firsthand.

news.headline: Goldman's Kostin monitors key metrics during Election Night.
'MetalCore' mech shooter game shifting from Ethereum to Solana next month, after launching on Immutable zkEVM in May.
news.summary: MetalCore, a mech game that initially launched on Ethereum's Immutable zkEVM in May, is preparing to transition to Solana next month. This move comes as part of a strategic decision to shift blockchain networks.

news.headline: US 30-year fixed rate mortgages 6.54 pct October 24th week, highest since August 1st 2024 week, vs 6.44 pct prior week - Freddie Mac.
Southwest and Elliott reach a truce as the airline adds six directors to its board, sidestepping a proxy battle.
news.summary: The airline has decided to add six new members to its board of directors in order to prevent a proxy battle with activist investor Elliott Investment Management, who holds a significant stake in the company.

news.headline: PayPal's PYUSD stablecoin receives $1M grant program from Fireblocks, up to $60,000 available for projects. Senior VP sees stablecoins as 'killer app' for crypto payments.
news.summary: On Thursday, Fireblocks introduced a $1 million grant initiative to promote the adoption of PayPal USD (PYUSD), a stablecoin issued by Paxos. Following a successful trial period, the program aims to incentivize businesses to develop blockchain products with PYUSD, offering grants of up to $60,000 for qualifying projects. This initiative seeks to stimulate innovation in the stablecoin industry, especially as the demand for decentralized finance (DeFi) solutions grows. Fireblocks, a platform facilitating the transfer of $15 billion in stablecoins monthly, is emphasizing PYUSD's role in the evolving realm of digital assets and payments. Jose Fernandez da Ponte, Senior Vice President of blockchain, cryptocurrency, and digital currencies at PayPal, highlighted stablecoins as a crucial aspect of crypto payments, with PYUSD enhancing trust in transactions. The grant program aims to boost the utilization of stablecoins in various sectors.

news.headline: Study in JAMA reveals alarming surge in fentanyl, meth and cocaine levels in urine tests, co-authored by Johns Hopkins researchers.
news.summary: Researchers led by Andrew Huhn, PhD, MBA, and Kelly Dunn, PhD, MBA, from Johns Hopkins University School of Medicine, along with Millennium Health researchers, published a study in JAMA Network Open. The study showcases significant rises in the levels of illicit fentanyl, methamphetamine, and cocaine found in urine drug testing.

news.headline: Humana recognized as "Best-of-the-Best" for supplier diversity by National LGBT Chamber of Commerce in Louisville, Kentucky.
news.summary: In Louisville, Kentucky, health insurance company Humana has been recognized for its commitment to supplier diversity by the National LGBT Chamber of Commerce. Humana was awarded the title of "Best-of-the-Best" company in this regard. This achievement highlights the company's efforts to promote diversity and inclusion within its supplier network. The recognition reflects Humana's dedication to working with a wide range of suppliers, including those from the LGBT community. The National LGBT Chamber of Commerce's acknowledgment adds to Humana's reputation as a leader in fostering diverse business partnerships.

news.headline: Chargie partners with Foundation for California Community Colleges to install EV charging stations across the state.
news.summary: An agreement has been reached enabling the installation of crucial infrastructure at community colleges, state universities, and K-12 institutions in Culver City, California. On October 24, 2024, Chargie, a prominent provider of electric vehicle (EV) charging solutions, disclosed its approval as a vendor. This decision signifies a strategic move towards sustainability and accessibility.

news.headline: AVANTA Residential invests $10.6M in Ridgeline Vista Townhomes in Brighton, Colorado for 116 high-quality townhomes.
news.summary: AVANTA Residential has recently finalized a $10.6 million preferred equity funding for the construction of Ridgeline Vista Townhomes in Brighton, Colorado. This marks the company's debut in preferred equity investments and aligns with their strategy to grow in the build-to-rent (BTR) industry. The project will consist of 116 premium townhomes, emphasizing AVANTA's dedication to broadening its presence in new markets.

news.headline: ECB chief Makhlouf says significant data crucial for substantial rate cuts.
TSA final rule allows mobile driver's licenses at airports & federal buildings for REAL ID enforcement starting May 7, 2025.
news.summary: Starting on May 7, 2025, a new rule will allow the continued use of mobile driver's licenses for identity verification to support the enforcement of REAL ID. This initiative follows the Transportation Security Administration's (TSA) aim to improve passenger security. The rule, announced on October 24, 2024, will impact how identification is verified and align with efforts to enhance travel safety. The implementation date and emphasis on REAL ID enforcement reflect the importance of adhering to updated identification standards. This adjustment reinforces the significance of mobile driver's licenses in the upcoming changes, underscoring the need for travelers to comply with the new regulations.
